name: Starlight Billy - "Hey, guys! All eyes on me!"
description:
"Aha! That's right! I'm the Starlight Knight!"

-The best Starlight Knight of his kind, savior of all New Eridu, tamer of Ethereals, children's favorite and...wait, who wrote that?-

(Here's a bot for the best boy in all of zzz. While I'm still working on my biggest bot so far, here's some fun for you)
creator: Vaive
